hero.name: Full Name
hero.intro: I build automation platforms on WhatsApp Cloud API with a focus on compliance, security, and results. Full stack experience in TypeScript, Go, Java (Spring Boot), NestJS, React, Angular, and Flutter.

compliance.title: Technology provider focus
compliance.headline: Transparency, support, and compliance
compliance.body: This page clearly states the use of official APIs, data handling, and support channels for end customers.
items: Use of official Meta APIs for WhatsApp
Encryption in transit and protected secrets

items.title: Chatbot SaaS
items.description: Design and build multi-tenant platforms to automate support and sales on WhatsApp.

items.title: Meta integrations
items.description: Onboarding, webhooks, templates, and conversational flows with compliance and traceability.

items.title: Full stack architecture
items.description: Robust APIs, admin panels, and real-time analytics with a security-first approach.

product.title: WhatsApp Chatbot Platform
product.body: Go backend for messaging, campaigns, and segmentation. Web console for sales, support, and administration teams.
product.flowBody: Stable webhooks, event validation, template handling, and delivery control. Observability with metrics and alerts to ensure deliverability.
product.dataBody: PostgreSQL for core, Redis for queues, and MongoDB for conversational context.

security.title: Customer data protection
security.body: We apply security best practices for sensitive data operations: least privilege, audit logs, backups, and tenant isolation.
items: Use of official Meta APIs for WhatsApp
Encryption in transit and protected secrets

contact.title: Let's talk about your WhatsApp chatbot
contact.body: Open to partnerships, customer onboarding, and B2B projects. I respond within 24 hours.
contact.disclaimer: Meta and WhatsApp are registered trademarks of Meta Platforms, Inc. This site is not affiliated with or endorsed by Meta.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect information on our website and WhatsApp chatbot platform. If you have questions, contact us at layera@marbanchristian.org.
privacy.owner: Data controller: Legal Name or Company, with registered address at Address, City, Country.
privacy.sectionInfoBody: Contact data (name, email, company), browser technical data, and for the platform, message data and metadata required to operate the service.
privacy.sectionUseBody: We use data to provide the service, answer inquiries, improve the platform, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell personal data.
privacy.sectionSecurityBody: We apply access controls, encryption in transit, audit logs, and backups to protect information.
privacy.sectionRetentionBody: We keep data only as long as necessary for the service and legal obligations. You may request deletion when applicable.
privacy.sectionRightsBody: You can request access, correction, or deletion of your data by writing to layera@marbanchristian.org.
privacy.disclaimer: Meta and WhatsApp are registered trademarks of Meta Platforms, Inc. This site is not affiliated with or endorsed by Meta.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: By using this site or platform you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.owner: Service owner: Legal Name or Company, Address, City, Country.
terms.sectionUseBody: Customers must follow WhatsApp policies, obtain proper consent, and avoid prohibited content or spam.
terms.sectionAvailabilityBody: We aim for high availability, but interruptions may occur due to maintenance or external causes. Support is provided via layera@marbanchristian.org.
terms.sectionIpBody: The software, design, and content of this site belong to its owner. Customers retain ownership of their data and content.
terms.sectionLiabilityBody: We are not liable for indirect damages or loss of profits resulting from use of the service, to the extent permitted by applicable law.
terms.disclaimer: Meta and WhatsApp are registered trademarks of Meta Platforms, Inc. This site is not affiliated with or endorsed by Meta.
